_id.description: Unique identifier for the violation record

Name.description: Name of the vehicle owner or driver

Violation Date.description: Date and time when the violation occurred

Violation Type.description: Type of violation (e.g., Speeding, Parking Violation, Running a Red Light)

Zone.description: Traffic zone where the violation occurred

Location.description: Specific location where the violation occurred

Speed Limit.description: Posted speed limit (only for speeding violations)

Recorded Speed.description: Speed recorded by the enforcement system (only for speeding violations)

Evidence.description: Filename or reference to photo evidence of the violation

Officer.description: Officer who recorded or validated the violation

Status.description: Current status of the violation (Recorded, Processed, etc.)

Action Taken.description: Enforcement action (Warning Issued, Fine Imposed, etc.)

Frequency.description: Number of times this violation has occurred for this vehicle

Notified.description: Whether the owner has been notified of the violation

Notification Date.description: When the notification was sent to the owner
